description: Curated catalog of Dota 2 map entity classnames + their key keyvalues, harvested from real addon maps. Use with map_add_entity / map_build.

entities.name: npc_dota_scripted_spawner
entities.purpose: Spawns NPCs that walk a waypoint path (native TD/lane mechanic).
entities.keyValues: targetname, CustomNPCName, NPCType, NPCFirstWaypoint (name of first path_track), teamnumber, vscripts

entities.name: info_target
entities.purpose: Generic named point marker (great as a waypoint/anchor read from vscript).

entities.name: path_track
entities.purpose: Waypoint node; chains to the next via 'target'. Used by scripted spawners / movement.
entities.keyValues: targetname, target (next node name), speed, radius, orientationtype

entities.name: trigger_multiple
entities.purpose: Brush volume that fires repeatedly on touch (BRUSH entity — needs a volume; prefer vscript distance checks for generated maps).
entities.keyValues: targetname, spawnflags, StartDisabled; outputs: OnTrigger, OnStartTouch, OnEndTouch

entities.name: trigger_hero
entities.purpose: Fires when a hero enters (Dota brush trigger).

entities.name: logic_timer
entities.purpose: Fires OnTimer on an interval (e.g. spawn waves).
entities.keyValues: targetname, RefireTime, UseRandomTime, StartDisabled; output OnTimer

entities.name: logic_relay
entities.purpose: Relays a trigger; good for grouping/decoupling I/O.

entities.name: point_template
entities.purpose: Groups entities to spawn at runtime from script.

entities.name: env_global_light
entities.purpose: Primary directional sun/sky light (required for proper lighting).

entities.name: info_particle_system
entities.purpose: Plays a particle system at a point.

entities.name: ent_fow_revealer
entities.purpose: Reveals an area's fog of war.

entities.name: dota_minimap_boundary
entities.purpose: Defines the playable minimap boundary corner.
